title: Add the unified serve target to a project
description: Wire the house dev loop onto a project: a `dev-server` leaf (@angular/build:dev-server — host 0.0.0.0, configurations development (default) / production, buildTarget <app>:build) and the `serve` composing target (@bespunky/nx-tools:serve — dev-server + optional Firebase emulators + optional shared co-driven browser, for the current or a chosen git worktree, under one graceful Ctrl+C). Replaces the old serve/serve-worktree/serve-with-shared-browser trio (those axes are now flags). Also wires the dev-only worktree tab label (worktree-tab-label.ts + app.config provider). The per-app sibling of serve-options: applied by the house `app` generator to every app and re-asserted by `scaffold.sh --repair`. Idempotent + self-healing.

project.description: Project to add the serve + dev-server targets to.

workspaceName.description: Override the workspace identity used as the base-host sentinel in the dev-only tab label. Defaults to the workspace root directory name — correct in every normal case.
